economic_notes: Operates Petro Gas Bar, Club SAPP, The Loonie Bin Gaming Lounge, Sapotaweyak Internet Services. Government business partnerships include Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP. VLT commitments of $168,532 annually to Manitoba Liquor and Lotteries.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is Manitoba. Consolidated entity includes 10 subsidiaries on line-by-line basis plus 2 government business enterprises (Aseneskak Casino LP and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP) on modified equity basis. Net debt position of $4,361,641. Other revenue line of $16,750,082 is very large and likely includes gaming/enterprise revenues and other program revenues not separately broken out on the face of the statement. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $16,923,248 + Health Canada $3,905,495 + Federal MKO $745,749 + Province of Manitoba $547,326 + CMHC $352,937 = $22,474,755 less net transfer to unexpended funding adjustment; OSR estimated as rental income + other revenue + GBE loss. Contingent liability of $298,853 related to ISC social services funding recoveries. COVID-19 funding of $83,702 received near year end. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
